title: Pugs Farming+
description: 🌾 Grow, cook, and harvest like never before — a rich farming upgrade that stays vanilla-friendly!
body:
Farming+ 🌾 makes agriculture fun and rewarding! Discover new crops, tools, and delicious recipes without losing Minecraft’s classic feel.

Features:

🌱 30+ new crops and tasty ingredients

🍳 Expanded cooking & brewing recipes

🤝 Seamless with Farmer’s Delight add-ons

🚀 Lightweight and performance-friendly

🍂 Seasonal textures for extra charm.

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means the world! https://ko-fi.com/pug116
